title: The Smile Factory Is Surrounded
description: Pages 1–5 focus on the smile factory is surrounded, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Franky, Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as the restored victims, Franky, the Tontatta, and Doflamingo's officers converge on the Smile Factory as Dressrosa's rebellion spreads.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: What now?! The people that used to be toys are moving on this factory!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As long as they don't have a key to the door, they aren't get- ting in!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: to the young master, this factory is as import- ant as his own life!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even if the whole sealing comes crashing down, it won't make a scratch on this place's Kairouseki walls!!! And most important of all...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: We've got two chief officers defending us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You couldn't ask for a bet- ter defended fortress!! Who's gonna be able to defeat them?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My Apolo- Gies!! You must let me through!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The king's plateau, outside the outer wall tower.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: some- thing's going on down there...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Where did that rock guy go?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: ....to cut off a man's head properly?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: This is how you do it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: There are two of the young master....!!

summary: The Smile Factory Is Surrounded develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Franky, Unknown person #1, Doflamingo, Unknown person #2, Doflamingo Family, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
